description: A venue operator needs to monitor parking lot capacity in real time and direct fans to available lots.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the real-time capacity of all stadium parking lots.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets data showing that Lot A and Lot B are full.

nodes.task_description: Update the digital signs on the roads leading to the stadium to direct new arrivals to Lot C and Lot D.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the text on the digital signs.

nodes.task_description: Send a push notification to the team's mobile app with parking updates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the parking update to fans.
